Module 5:
PLC Overview
!
Executive Summary
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

We are now at the Pre-Launch stage, and this is all about the Sideways
Sales Letter that we discussed in Module 1. As mentioned, there are three
pieces of Pre-Launch Content.
This is usually done through video these days, but even if you do just a
screencap video that’s OK. Video is what’s working right now so that’s
where we’ll focus.
You’ll be presenting your Problem-Solution Path throughout these videos.
In each video you present a problem and offer the solution. You can also
look at this as the “Opportunity-Solution” path.
In the example we’ll be reviewing Will Hamilton’s tennis launch, and you’ll
see how he presents an opportunity and talks strategy. In Module 2 we
went through all the Mental Triggers - you’ll see how these are built in as
you go through the next examples.
It’s important to position yourself as someone who the viewer should pay
attention to. And there are lots of ways to create this authority.
The first PLC is usually about defining some type of opportunity. The
second PLC is where you show them how they can make the
Transformation.
If there’s a weaker video it should be here, since it’s in the middle. In one of
the examples there are 4 PLC’s. This is okay, there is flexibility in the model
and it’s not set in stone.
There is also always an overall Story Arc. In Will Hamilton’s example, it’s
that all the pro’s have a strategy that wins.
!

-- 2 of 3 --

This overview should give you the basics on what you need to understand
as we dig into the examples…
